name: set_light_brightness
description: Adjust brightness of lights in a specific room or all rooms. Use this when the user wants lights brighter, dimmer, turned on (level=100), or turned off (level=0). Also use for implicit cues like 'too bright' or 'good night'.

room.description: Which room. Use 'all' if user wants every light affected.

level.description: Brightness 0-100. 0 = off, 100 = max. For 'dim a bit' use 30, for 'brighter' bump 20.

name: play_music
description: Play music by genre, mood, artist, or specific song. Pauses any current playback first.

name: control_playback
description: Control current music playback: pause, resume, stop, skip, previous, or adjust volume.

volume.description: Set volume directly 0-100. Only with action=volume_up/down to set absolute. Optional.

name: set_thermostat
description: Set AC/heating target temperature, or turn climate control on/off.

name: lock_door
description: Lock or unlock a specific door, or all doors. DANGEROUS: unlock requires user confirmation in the app layer.

name: set_timer
description: Start a countdown timer. For absolute times like 'wake me at 7am' use set_alarm instead.

name: set_alarm
description: Set an alarm at a specific clock time. For relative durations use set_timer.

name: set_reminder
description: Create a reminder at a future time or with a delay.

name: activate_scene
description: Activate a pre-configured scene that bundles multiple actions. Prefer specific tools when intent is clear; use scene only when user explicitly says 'movie mode', 'sleep mode', 'morning routine'.
